Membership

Choose Your Legacy

Select the plan that best fits the depth of the story you wish to preserve for future generations.

Free

$0/forever
  • Basic storytelling prompts
  • Up to 500MB storage
  • 1 Legacy Contact
  • Standard encryption
Choose Free

Yearly

$49/per year
  • Advanced AI recommendations
  • 10GB Secure storage
  • 5 Legacy Contacts
  • Speech-to-Text conversion
  • Multimedia support
Choose Yearly

Lifetime

$199/one-time
  • Everything in Yearly
  • Unlimited storage
  • Unlimited Legacy Contacts
  • High-fidelity video storage
  • Priority support
Choose Lifetime
